content: Canonical schema: tenants, sessions, skills, rate-limits, cost-tracking, audit. All use TENANT#{id} as PK. See ClawCore-Final-Architecture-Plan.md

title: Project codename: AWS Chimera
rationale: Multi-formed Greek creature reflects multi-tenant, multi-agent, multi-platform, self-evolving nature. AWS internal codename style (Bedrock, Mantle, Kuiper). CLI: chimera deploy/agent/skill.

content: 8-stack CDK architecture: Network, Data, Security, Observability, PlatformRuntime, Chat, Tenant, Pipeline. Each stack has single responsibility, enabling independent deployment and blast radius control.
